pages.title: I Won’t Be Your Fire
pages.tagline: Refuse to be the fire. Claim your peace.

pages.body: This raw anthem weaves distorted electric guitars with heavy trap 808 bass drums, creating a rain-soaked soundscape for a story of toxic dependency and emotional boundaries. The journey begins in soft, conversational vulnerability before soaring into powerful harmonies that reject self-sacrifice. It captures the painful realization that pain is not proof of love, shifting from intimate desperation to explosive rebellion as the narrator decides they will no longer be the source of their partner's destruction.
pages.styleSentence: A mid-tempo (86 BPM) emo-rap pop-punk fusion featuring distorted electric guitars, heavy trap-style 808 bass drums, atmospheric synths, and a raw female lead vocal with melodic runs over an emotional, rain-soaked soundscape.

pages.text:
[Intro - Voicemail, Soft Female Voice]
I saw your name light up again
same time, same storm
and I almost answered like always
but I can’t keep being the place you go
when you wanna fall apart

[Instrumental Intro]
Rain on glass
guitar comes in slow
808 heart under the floor

[Chorus - Female Lead]
I won’t be your fire
just because you miss the burn
I won’t say the sharp words
just to make the silence hurt
I know you want the thunder
when the quiet gets too loud
but I won’t be your reason
to keep breaking down

[Post-Chorus - Layered Vocals]
No, no, no
I won’t be your fire
No, no, no
I still care, but I’m tired

[Verse 1 - Female Lead, Melodic]
You call me when the room gets cold
when the posters on your wall
start looking like ghosts
You say you need a reason
just to feel something real
but every time I answer
I become what you can’t heal

I know the hallway lights
I know the bathroom floor
I know the kind of love
that turns into a war
I know you think the hurt
means somebody stayed
but pain is not proof
that love was ever safe

[Pre-Chorus - Female Lead]
I used to throw the match
then cry about the smoke
I used to say the things
that cut into your throat
But tonight I’m holding back
with both hands on the wire
If I love you at all
I can’t be your fire

[Chorus - Female Lead, Bigger]
I won’t be your fire
just because you miss the burn
I won’t say the sharp words
just to make the silence hurt
I know you want the thunder
when the quiet gets too loud
but I won’t be your reason
to keep breaking down

[Post-Chorus - Male Ghost Vocal Behind Her]
Don’t leave me alone
Don’t leave me alone
Don’t leave me alone
with my head like this

[Verse 2 - Male Ghost Vocal, Fragile Melodic Rap]
I keep your name in my phone
like a bruise I can press
black hoodie, dead screen
bad dreams in my chest
I don’t want peace
I don’t know what that means
I only feel close
when you’re angry at me

I been chasing the crash
cause the calm feels fake
I been calling it love
when it’s only escape
Say something cold
make it sound like you care
I can’t stand the dark
when there’s nobody there

[Female Reply - Spoken-Sung]
I hear you
I do
but I won’t hurt you
just to prove I’m still here

[Bridge - Duet, Slow Build]
[Male]
What am I supposed to do
when the night comes back?

[Female]
Breathe till the morning
don’t run to the match

[Male]
What if I disappear
when the signal dies?

[Female]
Then I’ll leave one light on
but I won’t feed the fire

[Male]
Say you hate me

[Female]
No

[Male]
Say you’re done

[Female]
No

[Male]
Say anything

[Female]
I’m saying no because I love you enough
not to become another wound

[Breakdown - Half-Time, Big Guitars]
I can miss you
and still not answer
I can love you
and leave the room
I can pray that you find daylight
without becoming your moon

I can hold all the good parts
and still bury the blade
I can remember your soft voice
without entering the cage
I can cry for the old us
without pulling you through
another night where the worst thing
I say becomes true

[Final Chorus - Full Band, Both Voices]
I won’t be your fire
just because you miss the burn
I won’t say the sharp words
just to make the silence hurt
I know you want the thunder
when the quiet gets too loud
but I won’t be your reason
to keep breaking down

[Final Chorus Variation - Female Lead]
I won’t be your fire
I won’t be your knife
I won’t be the dark thing
that helps you hate your life
I’ll leave a little light on
but I’m walking out now
I won’t be your reason
to keep breaking down

[Outro - Voicemail Texture]
I hope you get through tonight
I hope you don’t need pain
to know somebody loved you
I hope one day
quiet feels safe

[Last Whisper]
I won’t be your fire
but I’ll leave you the light

pages.caption: A rain-soaked soundscape where distorted guitars meet heavy 808 bass in a cinematic release of emotional resolve and self-preservation.
themes: The illusion of love through pain

pages.vocalStyle: breathy, vulnerable, and emotionally expressive delivery that shifts from soft conversational tones in the intro to powerful, layered harmonies in the post-chorus and soaring melodies in the verses.

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Whispers turn into soaring melodies that refuse to break.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Layers the vocals until the truth rings clear.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Heavy traps anchor the heart under the floorboards.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Keeps time on a broken clock, never missing beat.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: 808 heartbeat pulses beneath every step taken away.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Atmospheric pads paint the storm before it breaks.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Scattered echoes of a hallway light and ghost posters.

members.name: GUITAR
members.bio: Distorted strings cut through the rain like sharp words.

members.name: KEYS
members.bio: Piano runs guide the voice through emotional war.

levels.name: EXPLOSIVE REFUSAL
levels.emotion: explosive realization and refusal to break again

levels.name: QUIET AFTERMATH
levels.emotion: confused exhaustion in the quiet aftermath

levels.name: CINEMATIC RELEASE
levels.emotion: cinematic release of held-back energy and resolve

levels.name: FINALITY HOPE
levels.emotion: heartbreakingly firm finality with a spark of hope
